proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high wnt_activity_score have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines with low wnt_activity_score.

analyses.code:
from scipy import stats
hi = df['wnt_activity_score'] >= df['wnt_activity_score'].quantile(0.75)
stats.ttest_ind(df.loc[hi, 'dependency_KIF18A'], df.loc[~hi, 'dependency_KIF18A'])
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_KIF18A is -0.42 in high-WNT lines vs -0.28 in other lines (t-test p=0.08).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A lineage-specific subgroup may show stronger dependency_KIF18A signal than the overall screen average.

analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines have the lowest mean dependency_KIF18A score among lineages.
